summary: Phase 2 implementation testing complete for SepulangDinas app. Successfully tested Master Data Pasien page with Import/Export CSV and Print PDF buttons, Input Logbook modal with correct title 'Tambah Catatan Kegiatan', Status Pasien radio group, and Generator Laporan with e-Kinerja engine producing multiple points with category badges and copy functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal closes automatically and redirects to login after interaction with form elements

integration_issues.issue: Browser clipboard permission denied (normal in automation environment)

passed_tests: Master Data Pasien page loads at /dashboard/pasien
Import CSV, Export CSV, Print PDF buttons present and functional (mocked)
Input Logbook modal opens with correct title 'Tambah Catatan Kegiatan'
Status Pasien radio group with 3 options (PASIEN BARU, PASIEN LAMA, PASIEN PULANG) present
Generator Laporan page loads and shows patient count summary
Generate e-Kinerja button produces multiple points (11 points generated)
Salin Semua button present and clickable
Patient data showing 1 patient in Shift PAGI
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix modal session persistence issue - Input Logbook modal closes and redirects to login after user interactions, suggesting potential session management or authentication token refresh issue.
